siteDescription: Learn how modern language models work by implementing each part in Rust.
languagePickerIntro: Build a language model from first principles in Rust.
eyebrow: From text to a working model
homeTitle: Build an LLM from first principles
homeIntro: Follow small, executable examples until tensors, attention, training, and generation fit together as one Rust program.
examplesDescription: Every concept begins with a tiny Rust example and deterministic output.
formulasDescription: Symbols are introduced only when they explain the behavior you can observe.
historyDescription: Each chapter contrasts the modern component with the historical approach it replaced.
courseNote: Chapter 1 is ready: follow English and Cyrillic text from UTF-8 bytes through Unicode scalar values to vocabulary IDs.
courseTitle: From text to a tiny language model
courseDescription: Each localized chapter adds one tested idea to the same Rust implementation.
courseEmpty: The chapter contract is ready. Lessons appear only after every configured translation passes together.
footerNote: A static, localized course for understanding language models from the inside.
